They recognize that this code is merely for contract interaction.\n\n---\n\n### Specific Comments & Recommendations:\n\n- **Security Risk Score (Report 4):**  \n  Slightly higher at 0.1, possibly reflecting the minimal risk of misusing the interface if someone uses it improperly.
